name: Return to Life Cocktail (Vuelve a La Vida)
recipeIngredient: 1 Avocado, peeled and chopped, plus enough for garnish if desired
2 Green onions, including tops, sliced into fine disks
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil each type of seafood in salted water separately until tender.
- Octopus: You may need to purchase a whole octopus. A large one (more than 1 pound) may require up to 2 hours; a smaller one may take only 1/2 hours. Cut the thick portions of cooked octopus meat into 1/2-inch rings, but leave the slender tips of the ten legs.
- Shrimp: The shrimp are done when they turn pink about 3 to 4 minutes. After cooking, cool and peel.
- Crab meat: Fresh crabmeat requires about 3 minutes of cooking. Cool and remove the meat from the shells.
- Squid: Cut the squid into 1/4-inch rings, removing the hard core from the head and separating the tentacles into 3 or 4 bunches. Boil only for about 10 minutes; overcooking will toughen the meat.
2. Prepare the sauce by mixing together 1/2 cup ketchup, 1/2 cup fresh lime juice, 1/4 cup water, and salt to taste.
3. Toss the prepared seafood with the vegetables (chopped tomato) and cilantro.
4. Serve in old-fashioned ice-cream sundae glasses or in fluted goblets. If desired, garnish with slices of avocado. Makes 4 servings.
